title: baccharis tricuneata var. variifolia
intro: Baccharis tricuneata var. variifolia, also known as a type of shrub or small tree in the daisy family, is native to South America and is used in traditional medicine. The plant has been found to have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Baccharis tricuneata var. variifolia include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
